title: Kadhal En Kadhal Lyrics Mayakkam Enna Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kaadhal en kaadhal adhu kanneerula
Pochu adhu pochu ada thaneerula ...

Kaayam pudhu kaayam en ullukkulla
Paalaana nenju adhu veneerula

Adida avala, udhada avala
Vidra avala thaeveye illa
Aedhuvum puriyala, ulagam therila
sariyaa varala onnume illa

[suthudhu suthudhu thalayum suthudhu
kuppunu adicha beerinila
Paduthuk paduthuka odane thelinjidum
kalayila adikira morinila ] (2)

Aaayiram sonniye, kaadhula vaangala
Soottula thaenguren, nenjuthaan thaangala
Chinna chinnathaa dream-ellam kandaen
Acid oothita kannukulla

Nanben alukura kastama iruku
konjam kooda ava worth-e illa
Thaenooruna nenjukulla kallooruthe enna solla
ye padakirukku valai irukku kadalukulla meenaailla

Vendaam da venaam indha kaadhal mogam...
Ponnunga ellam nam vazhvin saabam
Pinnaadi poyi naan kandaen nyanam
Pattaachu saamy ennkidhuve podhum ..

Adida avala, udhada avala
Vidra avala thaeveye illa

Aaanvizhi thaenmozhi enkili naan bali
Kaadhali kiraadhagi en figure kannagi
Friends kooda thaan irukanum maama
figure vandhutaa romba tholla
Onna suttava urupuda maata
Unna thavira ennakonnum illa

Ohh kanavirukku color-e illa
padam paauren kadhaye illa
Odambirukku uyire illa
Uravirukku theerveilla (Vendaam da venaam ...)

Adida avala, udhada avala
Vidra avala thaeveye illa
Aedhuvum puriyala, ulagam therila
sariyaa varala onnume illa

[suthudhu suthudhu thalayum suthudhu
kuppunu adicha beerinila
Paduthuk paduthuka odane thelinjidum
kalayila adikira morinila ] (2)

Good Night .. Good Night
Good Night thank you so much machi ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal En Kadhal?

The song explores themes of love, heartbreak, and emotional turmoil.

Who composed the music for Mayakkam Enna?

GV Prakash Kumar composed the music for the movie.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song reflects the protagonist's emotional struggles and deep feelings of love and loss.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kadhal En Kadhal?

Dhanush penned the lyrics for the song.

When was Mayakkam Enna released?

The movie was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mayakkam Enna, the song Kadhal En Kadhal captures the intense emotions of love and heartbreak experienced by the protagonist. Dhanush's poignant lyrics and soulful rendition convey a deep sense of longing and sorrow. GV Prakash Kumar's haunting melody enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love. The song beautifully portrays the pain of unfulfilled desires and the bittersweet nature of romantic relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the raw emotions of love and heartbreak with Kadhal En Kadhal from Mayakkam Enna. Dhanush's heartfelt vocals combined with GV Prakash Kumar's soulful music create a hauntingly beautiful melody. Dive into the depths of passion and pain with this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: Movie: Mayakkam Enna Music: GV Prakash
Love, my love, it has turned into tears. It has gone, like water.
A new wound inside me. My heart, like a rock, has melted.
Hit her, leave her, let her go, there's no need. I don't understand anything, the world is unknown, nothing is right, nothing is there.
You said a thousand things, but I didn't hear. I'm hiding, my heart can't take it. I saw small dreams, but they were burned with acid.
Friend, it's hard to bear, she's not worth it. Sweetness turns to stone in my heart. What to say, I'm trapped, there's no fish in this sea of love.
I don't want this love desire. Girls are a curse in our lives. I found wisdom after the fact. Enough, God, this is enough for me.
Hit her, leave her, let her go, there's no need.

Her eyes are honey, her words are sweet, but I'm the sacrifice. The lover is a troublemaker, my figure is like Kannagi. Even friends should be careful, when a figure comes, it's a big problem. The one who shot you won't survive. There's nothing for me except you.
Oh, dreams have no color, I'm watching a movie without a story. The body has no life, there's no solution for relationships. (I don't want this...)
Hit her, leave her, let her go, there's no need. I don't understand anything, the world is unknown, nothing is right, nothing is there.
